text:
Call your name is the 15th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack, with lyrics by mpi and vocals by mpi and CASG. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Musical motifs

The song has 3 remixes:

Call your name _Gv_
Call your name _Gv_ (Instrumental)
Call your name ＜MODv＞

The chorus of the song (1:07-1:45) is a motif that appears in several tracks:

進撃st-hrn-egt20130629巨人 (3:38-4:15)
進撃vn-pf20130524巨人 (the track remixes the verse at 0:49-1:20 and the chorus at 1:52-2:36)
進撃pf-medley20130629巨人 (the verse and chorus is part of the medley 1:11-2:35)
attack音D (3:44-4:22)
TheWeightOfLives (1:20-1:58)

The bridge (2:28-2:56) is also a motif, used in eye-water (1:45-2:16), and its 2 remixes, 進撃gt20130218巨人 (1:14-1:46) and Call of Silence (1:43-2:14).
